soundGuide.pop: short zoom/timing accent; use mainly when zoom marker timing makes the accent obvious
soundGuide.ding: specific reveal, positive detail, answer, count, clear selection, or satisfying small payoff
soundGuide.success: completed task, solved problem, achieved result, win, or finished outcome
soundGuide.bonk: mistake, fail, wrong answer, awkward hit, clumsy outcome, or comic negative beat
soundGuide.funny: actual punchline or absurd comedy beat
soundGuide.bruh: cringe, disbelief, deflation, or 'come on' reaction
soundGuide.record_scratch: abrupt reversal, interruption, wait-what pivot, or sudden contradiction
soundGuide.dramatic: dramatic reveal, boom, ominous escalation, suspense hit, or major emphasis
soundGuide.other_sfx: a human likely used a sound here, but not one of the supported automation-safe families
